case_title: GEORGE MALAMPHY VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-05-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-05-2023 BY JUDGE PANG LY. PLAINTIFF GEORGE MALAMPHEY IS PRESENT. SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JUL-20-2023 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT REVERSED. THE COURT GRANTS THE APPEAL ON THE DENIAL OF THE MOTION TO VACATE. THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF DENIAL. DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY LUCIA LI WAS PRESENT FOR THE APPELLANT/DEFENDANT, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO. NO APPEARANCE BY GEORGE MALAMPHY, RESPONDENT/PLAINTIFF. JUDGE: HONORABLE SUZANNE RAMOS BOLANOS. CLERK: L. BARENG. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (D303)

CONTINUED TO SEP-13-2023 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPT. 611 FOR SMALL CLAIMS TRIAL. PLAINTIFF GEORGE MALAMPHY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DEANNA SKAGGS (PARALEGAL FOR CCSF) WITH WITNESS ERIC GUAJARDO. ***DEFENDANT WILL NOT STIPULATE TO THIS MATTER BEING HEARD BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM.*** PARTIES ARE INSTRUCTED TO REPORT FOR SMALL CLAIMS TRIAL TO DEPT. 611/JUDGE KARNOW TODAY AT 2:00 P.M. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Sep-13-2023 Continued To Sep-20-23 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 611

MOTION TO VACATE
Off Calendar Sep-13-2023 Granted With Continuance

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-20-2023 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Appeal on Denial of Motion to Vacate from the Small Claims Court.

Defendant/Appellant, City and County of San Francisco, the moving party is represented by LUCIA LI, Deputy City Attorney who is present with FRANCISCO VILELA, Legal Intern.
Plaintiff/Respondent in pro per GEORGE MALAMPHY, the opposing party is NOT present.

Lucia Li, Esq., testified on behalf of the Defendant/Appellant, City and County of San Francisco.

At the conclusion of the case, The Court GRANTS the APPEAL on the DENIAL of the Motion to Vacate. Counsel to provide Notice to Andrew Howard of the Coalition of Homelessness on behalf of Mr. Malamphy.

The case is remanded back to Small Claims Court. Counsel for the Appellant to provide proper notice to the respondent.

NO EXHIBITS were introduced.

Trial concludes and court is adjourned.
Judge: Honorable Suzanne Ramos Bolanos. Clerk: L. Bareng. Proceedings Not Reported. (D303)
